default: Based on the attached character reference sheet. A card-style illustration in vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Solid pastel-colored background. Inside is a white/cream rounded rectangle card with a subtle border. A gold double-quotation-mark (❝) decoration in the top-left corner of the card. Bold large Chinese text title centered in the upper portion of the card. In the bottom-right corner, a chibi / Q-version character partially overlapping the card border: cute East Asian woman with long wavy black hair, oversized head, small body (chibi 2:1 ratio), gold coin hair clip. Clean bold outlines, vibrant flat colors with soft cel-shading. Cute, expressive, high quality, detailed.
